description: A customer whose car is in for service is calling to get a status update.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their active repair order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully locates the repair order.

nodes.task_description: Check the technician's notes and the current status of the repair.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sees the status is 'Awaiting Part' and the technician's note says 'Waiting for replacement alternator'.

nodes.task_description: Check the ETA for the required part and provide the customer with an updated timeline for when the repair will be complete.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the part order, finds it will arrive tomorrow morning, and informs the customer the car should be ready by tomorrow afternoon.
